content: Analysis of auth.ts: Found 2 issues. (1) Missing null check on user parameter in login function at line 15. (2) Password comparison uses == instead of timing-safe comparison at line 23.
Analysis of utils.ts: Found 1 issue. (1) The sanitizeInput function does not handle unicode escape sequences, which could allow bypassing input validation.
Analysis of config.ts: No issues found. Configuration loading uses proper defaults and validates all required fields.
